creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Lars Herschke from comment #2)
The app shows a message that says it needs to generate some entropy first and an spinning indicator is shown in the main window. It says something like "if you do other things in the meantime like typing or moving the mouse there is a better chance to generate that entropy" (from the top of my head, I don't have the message in front of me).

But then, nothing happens. I let it be for more than 30 minutes while I was doing other work it qtpass was still trying to get the needed entropy.
